event: View of the Port of La Rochelle
description: A panoramic view of a French harbor at sunset or late afternoon. The wide waterway stretches across the center, lined with stone buildings and towers on the far shore. Sailing ships are moored in the harbor. On the left bank, tall trees frame the view, and several figures in 18th-century dress walk along the quay. Dramatic clouds fill the sky with golden, orange, and gray tones. The overall atmosphere is luminous and atmospheric.
